ORB works great as long as you indentify market structure first. Then you take the break and retest of the ORB levels. Higher probability as long as you trade with trend and there is displacement on the retest confirmed with price action (engulfings, pin bars, hammers) and volume.
The way i got taught the orb was to wait for the 5 min candle breakout then wait for the retest to enter and place stop below or above the breakout candle and seems to work well my way

Hey brother, the title of video says stop using 15min ORB but then you say most popular is the 15min. Are you using first 15min candle and dropping to a lower time frame such as 5min after or are you using 5min first candle as the ORB?

made an indicator that checks the first opposite candle after the break of OR. I noticed that many times there is no opposite candle because the breakout and continuation are so strong. The first opposite candle is often far from the box. I think candle validation and clearing previous candles’ highs and lows is much more efficient than waiting for an opposite candle before entry.
